title: Mellow Smoked Dutch Beef Risotto
description: A nutty, light, and rich keto-friendly Dutch dish featuring ground sugar and smoke, perfect for a date night.
instructions: Heat the smoked beef fat in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the ground beef and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the Arborio rice and cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes.
Add the white wine and cook, stirring constantly, until the liquid is almost completely absorbed, about 2 minutes.
Add 1 cup of beef broth to the pot and cook, stirring constantly, until the liquid is mostly absorbed, about 2 minutes.

Repeat the process of adding the broth in 1/2 cup increments, stirring constantly and allowing each portion to be absorbed before adding the next, until the rice is cooked and creamy, about 20-25 minutes.
Stir in the smoked paprika and brown sugar. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the risotto hot, topped with Parmesan cheese and chopped parsley.
